title: Set 01 - Routing Tables, Default Routes & OSPF
subject: Networking

questions.question: What does a routing table contain?
questions.description: Routing tables map destinations to next hops or outgoing interfaces.

questions.question: Which route is used when no more specific route matches?
questions.description: A default route catches traffic for destinations without a more specific route.

questions.question: Which routing protocol is link-state?
questions.description: OSPF uses link-state advertisements to build a topology database.
